publishedAbstract: - For an application that has parts that reside in different namespaces and that needs to consume the same shared volume, normally an NFS or CIFS server external to OCP is used. However, in an OCP cluster that has ODF, is it possible to use ODF to share the same volume for this application between different namespaces?- If such sharing is possible using ODF, what are the implications of this?
publishedTitle: How to share the same volume between namespaces using ODF 4
